declaration_kind.author: Reviewing Attorney
declaration_kind.basis: amendment to a condominium declaration under 33 M.R.S. § 1602-117; § 1602-117(d) reviewed — no change to unit boundaries, allocated interests or permitted uses requiring unanimous consent

consent_basis.author: Reviewing Attorney
consent_basis.basis: leasing-term amendment adopted by 71% vote under 33 M.R.S. § 1602-117(a); no § 1602-117(d) act

touches_1602_117d.author: Reviewing Attorney
touches_1602_117d.basis: 33 M.R.S. § 1602-117(d) review of the amended provisions

amended_provisions: Section 8.1 of the Declaration is deleted in its entirety and replaced with the following: "Section 8.1. Robin W. Coe unit may be leased for a term of less than thirty (30) days, and every lease must be in writing and made expressly subject to the Declaration and the Bylaws."
